option.name: -adjoin
tip: Join images into a single multi-image file.

option.name: -alpha
tip: Activate, deactivate, reset, or set the alpha channel.
Options: on, activate, off, deactivate, set, opaque, copy, transparent, extract, background, shape.

option.name: -attenuate
tip: Lessen (or intensify) when adding noise to an image.

option.name: -bias
tip: Add bias when convolving an image.

option.name: -caption
tip: Assign a caption to an image.

option.name: -clip
tip: Clip along the first path from the 8BIM profile.

option.name: -clip-mask
tip: Associate a clip mask with the image.

option.name: -clip-path
tip: Clip along a named path from the 8BIM profile.

option.name: -compress
tip: Type of pixel compression when writing the image.

option.name: -define
tip: Define one or more image format options.

option.name: -delay
tip: Display the next image after pausing.

option.name: -density
tip: Horizontal and vertical density of the image.

option.name: -display
tip: Get image or font from this X server.

option.name: -endian
tip: Endianness (MSB or LSB) of the image.

option.name: -family
tip: Render text with this font family.

option.name: -fill
tip: Color to use when filling a graphic primitive.

option.name: -filter
tip: Use this filter when resizing an image.

option.name: -fuzz
tip: Colors within this distance are considered equal.

option.name: -gravity
tip: Types: NorthWest, North, NorthEast, West, Center, East, SouthWest, South, SouthEast.

option.name: -intensity
tip: Method to generate an intensity value from a pixel.

option.name: -intent
tip: Type of rendering intent when managing the image color.

option.name: -interline-spacing
tip: Set the space between two text lines.

option.name: -interword-spacing
tip: Set the space between two words.

option.name: -kerning
tip: Set the space between two letters.

option.name: -label
tip: Assign a label to an image.

option.name: -loop
tip: Add Netscape loop extension to your GIF animation.

option.name: -matte
tip: Store matte channel if the image has one.

option.name: -page
tip: Size and location of an image canvas (setting).

option.name: -precision
tip: Maximum number of significant digits to print.

option.name: -read-mask
tip: Associate a read mask with the image.

option.name: -remap
tip: Transform image colors to match this set of colors.

option.name: -repage
tip: Size and location of an image canvas.

option.name: -respect-parentheses
tip: Settings remain in effect until parenthesis boundary.

option.name: -seed
tip: Seed a new sequence of pseudo-random numbers.

option.name: -stretch
tip: Render text with this font stretch.

option.name: -style
tip: Render text with this font style.

option.name: -support
tip: Resize support: > 1.0 is blurry, < 1.0 is sharp.

option.name: -texture
tip: Name of texture to tile onto the image background.

option.name: -verbose
tip: Print detailed information about the image.

option.name: -weight
tip: Render text with this font weight.

option.name: -write-mask
tip: Associate a write mask with the image.

option.name: -word-break
tip: Sets whether line breaks appear wherever the text would otherwise overflow.

option.name: -adaptive-blur
tip: Adaptively blur pixels; decrease effect near edges.

option.name: -adaptive-sharpen
tip: Adaptively sharpen pixels; increase effect near edges.

option.name: -auto-gamma
tip: Automagically adjust gamma level of image.

option.name: -auto-level
tip: Automagically adjust color levels of image.

option.name: -bilateral-blur
tip: Non-linear, edge-preserving, and noise-reducing smoothing filter.

option.name: -black-threshold
tip: Force all pixels below the threshold into black.

option.name: -blue-shift
tip: Simulate a scene at nighttime in the moonlight.

option.name: -blur
tip: Reduce image noise and reduce detail levels.

option.name: -border
tip: Surround image with a border of color.

option.name: -brightness-contrast
tip: Improve brightness / contrast of the image.

option.name: -cdl
tip: Color correct with a color decision list.

option.name: -chop
tip: Remove pixels from the image interior.

option.name: -colorize
tip: Colorize the image with the fill color.

option.name: -color-matrix
tip: Apply color correction to the image.

option.name: -colors
tip: Preferred number of colors in the image.

option.name: -contrast
tip: Enhance or reduce the image contrast.

option.name: -contrast-stretch
tip: Improve contrast by 'stretching' the intensity range.

option.name: -convolve
tip: Apply a convolution kernel to the image.

option.name: -decipher
tip: Convert cipher pixels to plain pixels.

option.name: -despeckle
tip: Reduce the speckles within an image.

option.name: -distort
tip: Distort images according to given method and args.

option.name: -draw
tip: Annotate the image with a graphic primitive.

option.name: -edge
tip: Apply a filter to detect edges in the image.

option.name: -encipher
tip: Convert plain pixels to cipher pixels.

option.name: -enhance
tip: Apply a digital filter to enhance a noisy image.

option.name: -equalize
tip: Perform histogram equalization to an image.

option.name: -evaluate
tip: Evaluate an arithmetic, relational, or logical expression.

option.name: -frame
tip: Surround image with an ornamental border.

option.name: -gaussian-blur
tip: Reduce image noise and reduce detail levels.

option.name: -geometry
tip: Preferred size or location of the image.

option.name: -identify
tip: Identify the format and characteristics of the image.

option.name: -ift
tip: Implements the inverse discrete Fourier transform (DFT).

option.name: -implode
tip: Implode image pixels about the center.

option.name: -integral
tip: Calculate the sum of values (pixel values) in the image.

option.name: -level
tip: Adjust the level of image contrast.

option.name: -level-colors
tip: Level image with the given colors.

option.name: -mean-shift
tip: Delineate arbitrarily shaped clusters in the image.

option.name: -median
tip: Apply a median filter to the image.

option.name: -mode
tip: Make each pixel the 'predominant color' of the neighborhood.

option.name: -modulate
tip: Vary the brightness, saturation, and hue.

option.name: -monochrome
tip: Transform image to black and white.

option.name: -morphology
tip: Apply a morphology method to the image.

option.name: -negate
tip: Replace every pixel with its complementary color.

option.name: -noise
tip: Add or reduce noise in an image.

option.name: -normalize
tip: Transform image to span the full range of colors.

option.name: -opaque
tip: Change this color to the fill color.

option.name: -ordered-dither
tip: Add a noise pattern to the image with specific amplitudes.

option.name: -perceptible
tip: Pixel value less than |epsilon| become epsilon or -epsilon.

option.name: -posterize
tip: Reduce the image to a limited number of color levels.

option.name: -profile
tip: Add, delete, or apply an image profile.

option.name: -raise
tip: Lighten/darken image edges to create a 3-D effect.

option.name: -range-threshold
tip: Perform either hard or soft thresholding within some range of values in an image.

option.name: -region
tip: Apply options to a portion of the image.

option.name: -resample
tip: Change the resolution of an image.

option.name: -roll
tip: Roll an image vertically or horizontally.

option.name: -rotate
tip: Apply Paeth rotation to the image.

option.name: -selective-blur
tip: Selectively blur pixels within a contrast threshold.

option.name: -shade
tip: Shade the image using a distant light source.

option.name: -shave
tip: Shave pixels from the image edges.

option.name: -shear
tip: Slide one edge of the image along the X or Y axis.

option.name: -sigmoidal-contrast
tip: Increase the contrast without saturating highlights or shadows.

option.name: -solarize
tip: Negate all pixels above the threshold level.

option.name: -sort-pixels
tip: Sort each scanline in ascending order of intensity.

option.name: -sparse-color
tip: Fill in a image based on a few color points.

option.name: -splice
tip: Splice the background color into the image.

option.name: -spread
tip: Displace image pixels by a random amount.

option.name: -statistic
tip: Replace each pixel with corresponding statistic from the neighborhood.

option.name: -strip
tip: Strip image of all profiles and comments.

option.name: -swirl
tip: Swirl image pixels about the center.

option.name: -thumbnail
tip: Create a thumbnail of the image.

option.name: -tile
tip: Tile image when filling a graphic primitive.

option.name: -tint
tip: Tint the image with the fill color.

option.name: -transparent
tip: Make this color transparent within the image.

option.name: -transpose
tip: Flip image vertically and rotate 90 degrees.

option.name: -transverse
tip: Flop image horizontally and rotate 270 degrees.

option.name: -unique-colors
tip: Discard all but one of any pixel color.

option.name: -vignette
tip: Soften the edges of the image in vignette style.

option.name: -wave
tip: Alter an image along a sine wave.

option.name: -wavelet-denoise
tip: Removes noise from the image using a wavelet transform.

option.name: -white-balance
tip: Automagically adjust white balance of image.

option.name: -white-threshold
tip: Force all pixels above the threshold into white.

option.name: -channel-fx
tip: Exchange, extract, or transfer one or more image channels.

option.name: -separate
tip: Separate an image channel into a grayscale image.

option.name: -clut
tip: Apply a color lookup table to the image.

option.name: -compare
tip: Mathematically and visually annotate the difference between an image and its reconstruction.

option.name: -complex
tip: Perform complex mathematics on an image sequence.

option.name: -copy
tip: Copy pixels from one area of an image to another.

option.name: -crop
tip: Cut out a rectangular region of the image.

option.name: -deconstruct
tip: Break down an image sequence into constituent parts.

option.name: -evaluate-sequence
tip: Evaluate an arithmetic, relational, or logical expression.

option.name: -fx
tip: Apply mathematical expression to an image channel(s).

option.name: -hald-clut
tip: Apply a Hald color lookup table to the image.

option.name: -layers
tip: Optimize, merge, or compare image layers.

option.name: -mosaic
tip: Create a mosaic from an image sequence.

option.name: -poly
tip: Build a polynomial from the image sequence and the corresponding terms (coefficients and degree pairs).

option.name: -print
tip: Interpret string and print to console.

option.name: -process
tip: Process the image with a custom image filter.

option.name: -delete
tip: Delete the image from the image sequence.

option.name: -duplicate
tip: Duplicate an image one or more times.

option.name: -insert
tip: Insert last image into the image sequence.

option.name: -swap
tip: Swap two images in the image sequence.

common_option.name: -distribute-cache
tip: Distributed pixel cache spanning one or more servers.

common_option.name: -list
tip: Print a list of supported option arguments.
Types: Color, Delegate, Format, Font, List, Locale, Log, Magick, Module, Policy, Threshold.
